mapper.select: SELECT memPwd FROM member WHERE memId=#{id}
SELECT memId FROM member WHERE memId=#{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO member(memId, memPwd, memName, memEmail, memHp, memZipcode, memAddress1, memAddress2) VALUES (#{memId}, #{memPwd}, #{memName}, #{memEmail}, #{memHp}, #{memZipcode}, #{memAddress1}, #{memAddress2})
mapper.update: UPDATE member SET memPwd = #{memPwd}, memName = #{memName}, memEmail = #{memEmail}, memHp = #{memHp}, memZipcode = #{memZipcode}, memAddress1 = #{memAddress1}, memAddress2 = #{memAddress2} WHERE memId=#{memId}
